title_zh: Ramp工程师如何用Codex加速代码审查
title_en: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
summary_zh: Ramp工程师利用集成了GPT-5.5的Codex进行代码审查和改进，使他们能在几分钟内获得实质性反馈，而非几小时。
summary_en: Ramp engineers use Codex integrated with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, enabling them to receive substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过使用Codex，Ramp工程师显著缩短了代码审查周期，提高了开发效率，促进了更快速的产品迭代。
why_it_matters_en: By using Codex, Ramp engineers significantly shorten the code review cycle, improve development efficiency, and enable faster product iteration.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI模型推翻离散几何中的核心猜想
title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
summary_zh: OpenAI模型解决了已经存在80年的单位距离问题，推翻了离散几何中的一个重要猜想，标志着AI驱动数学的重大里程碑。
summary_en: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项成果展示了AI在解决复杂数学问题上的潜力，推动了人工智能在科学研究领域的应用进展。
why_it_matters_en: This achievement demonstrates AI's potential to solve complex mathematical problems, advancing the application of artificial intelligence in scientific research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI教育助力计划迈入新阶段
title_en: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
summary_zh: OpenAI推动教育助力计划新发展，通过建立新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训及工具推广，促进全球学校中人工智能的应用，提升学习效果。
summary_en: OpenAI advances its Education for Countries program by expanding AI adoption in schools worldwide through new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
why_it_matters_zh: 该文章体现了OpenAI致力于利用人工智能改善全球教育的最新努力，展示了其实际行动和合作拓展。
why_it_matters_en: The article highlights OpenAI's latest efforts to enhance global education through AI, demonstrating concrete actions and expanded partnerships.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The Next Phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项为期多年的人工智能合作计划，旨在扩大部署范围，培养本地人才，并支持企业和公共服务运用人工智能。
summary_en: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
why_it_matters_zh: 此合作将促进新加坡人工智能技术的发展和应用，提升本地技能水平，推动经济和公共服务创新。
why_it_matters_en: This partnership will advance AI development and application in Singapore, enhance local skillsets, and drive innovation in the economy and public services.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore. Category: business_investment. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 推动内容出处技术，构建更安全透明的人工智能生态
title_en: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
summary_zh: OpenAI通过内容凭证(Content Credentials)、SynthID以及验证工具，推动AI内容出处技术的发展，帮助人们识别并信任AI生成的媒体。
summary_en: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着AI生成内容日益增多，确保内容真实性和追溯来源变得尤为重要。OpenAI的这些举措增强了内容透明度，提升了用户对AI生成内容的信任。
why_it_matters_en: As AI-generated content becomes more widespread, ensuring authenticity and traceability is crucial. OpenAI's initiatives enhance transparency and increase user trust in AI-generated content.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI与戴尔合作将Codex引入混合及本地企业环境

summary_zh: OpenAI与戴尔合作，将Codex引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业在数据和工作流中安全部署AI编码代理。
summary_en: OpenAI and Dell are collaborating to introduce Codex into hybrid and on-premise environments, enabling enterprises to securely deploy AI coding agents across data and workflows.
why_it_matters_zh: 此次合作帮助企业更灵活地利用AI编程技术，提升安全性和工作效率，适应多样化的企业环境。
why_it_matters_en: This partnership enables enterprises to flexibly leverage AI coding technology, enhancing security and efficiency while adapting to diverse enterprise settings.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OpenAI and Dell Partner to Bring Codex to Hybrid and On-Premise Enterprise Environments. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI与马耳他合作向所有公民推广ChatGPT Plus

title_zh: ChatGPT中的全新个人理财体验
title_en: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
summary_zh: 美国的ChatGPT专业版用户可预览全新的个人理财体验。用户可安全连接财务账户，基于个人的财务背景、目标和优先事项，获得由人工智能驱动的洞察和指导。
summary_en: Pro users in the U.S. can preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT. Securely connect your financial accounts and receive AI-powered insights and guidance tailored to your financial context, goals, and priorities.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项功能将ChatGPT与个人理财结合，提升了理财的智能化和个性化，帮助用户更好地管理财务。
why_it_matters_en: This feature integrates ChatGPT with personal finance, enhancing intelligent and personalized financial management to help users better manage their finances.

summary_zh: Databricks在企业代理工作流程中采用了GPT-5.5，该模型在OfficeQA Pro基准测试中创造了新的最高水平。
summary_en: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
why_it_matters_zh: 引入GPT-5.5能显著提升企业代理的智能化水平和工作效率，因为该模型在相关基准测试中表现卓越，证明了其高性能和实际应用价值。
why_it_matters_en: The adoption of GPT-5.5 significantly enhances the intelligence and efficiency of enterprise agent workflows, as the model's outstanding performance on benchmarks demonstrates its high capability and practical value.
